title: cryptobasis regelii
intro: Cryptobasis regelii, also known as the Coral Tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in the savannas and grasslands of Kenya and Tanzania. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cryptobasis regelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and infusions, are often used to treat a range of health issues, and are typically administered orally or topically.
